base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of sagat — a character (boss) from 1991 street fighter ii. Sagat — World Warrior boss 3/4. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Sagat — World Warrior boss 3/4; Tiger Shot + Tiger Uppercut. Took Ryu's ultimate Hadouken scar
